title: backportsupplement
description: This mod adds supplementary content to enhance the existing backported features, making the backported content for version 1.12.2 more complete and detailed.
body:
This mod now triggers debarking sound effects and animations when players right-click any wood block with an axe, enhancing Debark mod's compatibility with higher-version stripping mechanics.

Additionally, it automatically adds newly detected log types from the player's mod environment to Debark's configuration file, dynamically expanding the debarkable blocks list. The mod backports features including:

Frigid Chickens and Tropical Chickens (added in snapshot 25w06a)

Blue and Brown Eggs

Cactus Flowers

Other plants updated in 1.21.5
